THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT QUINN, MEG RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT SCOTT, MICHAEL $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO RETURN DEFENDANT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT IN A TIMELY MANNER PURSUANT TO CCP 1950.5. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCOTT, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT QUINN, MEG PLAINTIFF DID NOT GIVE PROPER NOTICE TO DEFENDANT TO VACATE THE PRESISES. PLAINTIFF IMPROPERLY LOCKED OUT DEFENDANT AND IMPROPERLY ENTERED HER ROOM AND REMOVED HER BELONGINGS. PLAINTIFF IMPROPERLY ALLOWED A THIRD PARTY TO MOVE INTO THE APARTMENT. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLSHED THAT DEFENDANT RESPONSIBLE FOR DAMAGE TO PERSONAL PROPERTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
